stardewaly.rosalie_testbackstory.0: Shane's parents couldn't afford to put Shane in gridball camp for the summers like his classmates, so they'd send him here while they worked.$2 #$b# Rosalie's family lived nearby, and her mother was often working late hours at the clinic.$2 #$b# Her brother and sister had friends to play with when their mom worked, but Rosalie would come here alone to look at the animals.$1 #$b# I know they seem drastically different from each other, especially now, but Rosa and Shane became fast friends. #$b# Every summer that Shane visited from then on, they spent nearly every day together. #$b# Until, about the time Shane and Rosa were about 10 years old...$2
stardewaly.rosalie_testbackstory.1: No offence to you hens but...$9 #$b# What am I supposed to do here without Rosa around in the summers?$9
stardewaly.rosalie_testbackstory.3: No... I'm supposed to be packing...$2 #$b# Do... do you hate me, Farm Boy...?$2 #$b# For leaving, Stardew Valley...?$6
stardewaly.rosalie_testbackstory.4: Hey, come on... #$b# No, I don't hate you, Rosa...$s #$b# I'm just... scared...#$b# But, you're coming back, after the war is over, right?$h
stardewaly.rosalie_testbackstory.5: Of course!$2 #$b# I'm gonna be the first to see you play on the Tunnelers! I promise!
stardewaly.rosalie_testbackstory.6: Just... Don't forget me... okay, Farm Boy?$2
rosalie.prearrival.1: Hey, @! #$b# Sorry, we'll be open shortly, Robin's just finishing up.$h
rosalie.prearrival.2: I'm just installing something for our new resident.
rosalie.prearrival.3: No, no, this is for all of us! #$b# At some point or another, we'll be as old as George and need a ramp for everything!$1
rosalie.prearrival.4: That's true. We probably should have installed this ages ago.$1 #$b# If it weren't for a certain mayor being a stickler about permits.$3
rosalie.prearrival.5: I guess that's a small benefit to her situation... #$b# If you can call it that...$s
rosalie.prearrival.6: I'm glad that Rosie is going to be accommodated! #$b# For real this time...$3
rosalie.prearrival.7: My niece, Rosalie, is coming to stay with me!$1 #$b# See, @, Rosie's... disabled.$2 #$b# She has a condition, and sometimes walking can be difficult...$2 #$b# She would have been here years ago if it weren't for that--$3
rosalie.prearrival.8: Well, that doesn't matter. #$b# The point is, she's finally going to stay here in Pelican Town.$h #$b# We're turning the dining room into a bedroom for Rosie. #$b# And this ramp here is when she's in her wheelchair. #$b# She doesn't need it all the time, but I think it'll be a nice surprise for her!$1
rosalie.prearrival.9: I used to babysit Rosalie and her siblings when her mom was working late at the hospital. #$b# She was a bit shy, barely said a word to me for a while when we met.$2 #$b# Turns out the kid had a killer voice, who knew?$1
rosalie.prearrival.10: She hasn't been back in the valley in about twenty years. #$b# She lived a bit too far to visit.$2 #$b# But she's lived in Zuzu City as an actress for a few years now. #$b# I'd been trying to get her to visit but that-$3
rosalie.prearrival.11: Well, anyway, I have to get going. #$b# Rosie's gonna need all the help she can get moving her things.$2 #$b# I'm leaving Emily in charge of the saloon while I'm gone.$1 #$b# You'll make sure she doesn't burn the place down, right?$1
rosalie.prearrival.12: Rosalie's had a rough couple of years...$2 #$b# But, despite the circumstances, I'm glad she's coming back to Pelican Town.$1 #$b# I just hope she'll be happy here.$2
RosalieTragicBeauty.1: The saloon was a bit overstimulating tonight, and my mom has been bugging me to go outside.$2 #$b# So, this is me doing that...$1
RosalieTragicBeauty.2: Feel free to sit! I could use the company, I don't mind.
RosalieTragicBeauty.3: Hey, you're new, right?$7#$b# I mean, I know technically I am too, but I also lived here as a kid so, it's kinda... #$b#...$2 #$b# Weird... I don't know...$2
RosalieTragicBeauty.4: It's nice being back! #$b# My family moved due to the war, like, 20 years ago, and...$1 #$b#...$2 #$b# Well, I missed it...
RosalieTragicBeauty.5: Can you tell me something, @?$2 #$b# Maybe it's just me, but...$1#$b# When you moved here, was everyone just... staring at you?$2 #$b# I expected that when I decided to move back. That everyone would look at me and be... #$b# ... disappointed...$3
RosalieTragicBeauty.6: Ever since I was a kid, everyone in town said that I'd be something some day...$2 #$b# Anything but... this...$2 #$b# I know my Uncle and Robin meant well with the ramp, and it's really sweet,$2 #$b# but now that people know I'm just... a nobody...$2 #$b# And with the ramp... They probably expected I'd be some tragic beauty like in the movies.$6 #$b# But I'm not... and now they probably assume I'm lazy...$3
RosalieTragicBeauty.7: Well, hopefully I won't be using my Uncle's space for longer than necessary. #$b# I hate that I've inconvenienced everyone enough...$1
RosalieTragicBeauty.8: Oh, I'm fine! #$b# I know not everyone can achieve their bright light Zuzu City dreams and life happens!$1 #$b# I didn't mean to sound ungrateful or more egotistical, I'm sorry...$2
RosalieTragicBeauty.9: So... how long have you lived here? Did you always want to be a farmer like your grandpa?
RosalieHarveyApt1: I'm just one of the many who this happened to.$2 #$b# I don't blame the nurse. I don't blame anyone.$2 #$b# Just my bad luck.$1
RosalieHarveyApt2: I'm so sorry that happened, Rosalie.$2 #$b# The human body is still quite the mystery. #$b# Science is getting better every day, so who knows.#$b# Maybe one day, we'll have a more definitive answer.$1
RosalieHarveyApt4: Well, we don't have to keep talking about it if you don't want to.
RosalieHarveyApt5: It is nice that my Uncle Gus already gave you the run down. #$b# No need for a PowerPoint presentation or a video essay.$1
RosalieHarveyApt6: It is certainly convenient. #$b# But I think it's best if I hear about it from you. #$b# I know you've been through quite a bit in the last little while alone... How is your mental health?$2
RosalieHarveyApt7: It's been better... But also worse.$2 #$b# Everything is still fresh...$2 #$b# A lot... happened in the last two years before... everything...$6
RosalieHarveyApt8: And your support system? #$b# Friends? Family, outside Gus?
RosalieHarveyApt9: My sister helped me, emotionally... We talk almost every day. #$b# She keeps saying I should feel relieved...$2 #$b# But... I don't.$3
RosalieHarveyApt10: Well, Rosalie, now that you're here in Pelican Town, I'm here to support you every step of the way.
RosalieHarveyApt11: But I need to ask, in regards to your situation... Are you worried?$s
RosalieHarveyApt15: Well, Rosalie, it's good you're keeping a positive attitude. #$b# But... I'm concerned about your mental health.$2
RosalieHarveyApt16: Yeah... I know.$3 #$b# I'm fine, really. It's all for the best.
RosalieHarveyApt17: Well, I have a great colleague who runs a therapy group every Monday morning-
RosalieHarveyApt19: Oh? That's good!$1 #$b# Now, I know you lived here before. #$b# So, you must know it can be... tricky living in a small town.$2 #$b# But I promise you, everything you and I discuss is confidential unless--$1
RosalieHarveyApt20: Unless I am a harm to myself, others, or a child is involved. Got it.$3
RosalieHarveyApt22: It's alright, Rosalie. #$b# I know this has been a very difficult time for you...$2 #$b# But I am impressed with how diligent you are with your health. #$b# The perks of having your mom as a nurse, huh?$1
RosalieHarveyApt24: Thank you for not making a big deal about it. #$b# Most people would consider finishing each other's sentences to be-
RosalieHarveyApt26: I was gonna say 'annoying', but sure!$1
RosalieHarveyApt27: I mean um-$8 #$b# I-I'm so sorry!$8 #$b# That was... inappropriate...$s
RosalieHarveyApt28: Well, then *ahem*... #$b# As I was saying, just know that you can come to me about anything, alright?
RosalieHarveyApt29: Copy that. Anything to get me back to normal.$1
RosalieHarveyApt30: Yes, well... #$b# With your condition and the stress from the move, especially in your situation... #$b# Flare ups are bound to happen.$2 #$b# Your version of normal that you used to know is...$2 #$b# ...$s #$b# Well, I shouldn't have to tell you.$2
RosalieHarveyApt32: Are you in pain right now, Rosalie?
RosalieHarveyApt33: On a scale from 1-20, I'm an 8. Pretty normal for me. #$b# Though I wish I was a ten!$9
RosalieHarveyApt35: You know like--$1 #$b# ...$2 #$b# Never mind...$3 #$b# Are we done for today?
RosalieHarveyApt36: I believe so... #$b# I'll see you in a couple days, Rosalie.$1
RosalieHarveyApt37: Out of curiosity... How do you like your coffee?$7
RosalieEmilyWalk2: Rosalie, you're in luck! #$b# Once we go up this hill, we just got another half hour walk ahead of us!$h
RosalieEmilyWalk4: Emily, I...$2 #$b# I don't think I can...$2
RosalieEmilyWalk5: Of course you can! #$b# I know you haven't been feeling well lately, #$b# But once we get you to the spa, I promise, you'll perk right up!!$h
RosalieEmilyWalk6: But then we have the walk back to town...$2 #$b# and my arm hurts so much, I can't think straight...$2 #$b# I just.. I don't know...$2
RosalieEmilyWalk7: Do you want to rest again?$s
RosalieEmilyWalk10: How long do you think you'll be?$3
RosalieEmilyWalk11: *sigh* I don't know...$2 #$b# You go on ahead, Emily...
RosalieEmilyWalk12: Are you sure? I don't mind waiting.$2
RosalieEmilyWalk13: Yeah, it's fine!$1 #$b# You deserve to get some relaxation in before work. #$b# I should probably save my energy, anyway.$1
RosalieEmilyWalk14: I don't like leaving you behind...$2 #$b#...$2#$b#I'll go,$3 #$b#But we're gonna try again next week, okay?
RosalieEmilyWalk15: Oh, hi @!$1 #$b# Am I in the way? I can move if you need!$2
RosalieEmilyWalk17: I thought I could do it...$2 #$b# I used to be able to run up and down these hills as a kid...$2 #$b# You know, five years ago, I was able to dance on stage, #$b# Even in heels with some practice!$1 #$b# But now, #$b# ...$11 #$b# Now, I can't walk past Pierre's without being in pain or getting exhausted...$6
RosalieEmilyWalkQuestion: *Rosalie just looks like she's fighting tears*
RosalieEmilyWalkAnswer1: You should try going on a diet! Lose all that fat!
RosalieEmilyWalkAnswer2: Have tried doing yoga or other excersizes?
RosalieEmilyWalkResponse1: HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA$1 #$b# Oh, @! You're such a comedian!$3#$b# You think I haven't tried that?!$5 #$b# Sorry, that was... mean...of me...$2#$b# You're... fine...$3
RosalieEmilyWalkResponse2: I do like yoga. #$b# But I can't do it all the time...$2 #$b# Plus a lot of poses aren't made with...$2 #$b# My body shape in mind...$2
RosalieEmilyWalk18: It's hard enough having extra weight to carry.$2#$b# My medication makes it harder to lose it...$2 #$b# I was much to look at before I gained all this weight...$2 #$b# But now, I just... I feel like...$11
RosalieEmilyWalk19: Oh my, Yoba!$8 #$b# I'm so sorry, I didn't mean to make this all about me me me!$1 #$b# How are things on %farm?
RosalieGeorgeWC1: I heard you were in a wheelchair.#$b#Your Uncle even installed this ramp for you.
RosalieGeorgeWC3: Now, Miss Rosalie, would you mind telling me why this is the first time I'm seeing you in a wheelchair? #$b# And why you were walking around just fine since you arrived?
RosalieGeorgeWC5: Are you too lazy to walk? #$b#To climb the stairs into the saloon?#$b#You were always the lazy one of your siblings!#$b#While your poor mother was working at the hospital,#$b# You were always too busy chasing boys!
RosalieGeorgeWC6: I was twelve when I left the Valley, I-$3
RosalieGeorgeWC7: No, no! I remember!#$b# You were always hanging around that boy!
RosalieGeorgeWC9: Putting sticks in the wheels of my chair, and-
RosalieGeorgeWC10: My sister did that!$5 #$b# I never would have put sticks in your chair!$5
RosalieGeorgeWC11: Aha! So you admit it!$h #$b# It was YOU who was the lazy one!#$b# So lazy that you refuse to walk when the day suits you!#$b#You can go up and down stairs, so do it!#$b#Don't go making everyone cater to you because you're lazy!#$b# The ramp is for people like me!#$b#Not for fat, lazy slobs like you!
RosalieGeorgeWC13: What? I just said what we were all thinking!
RosalieGeorgeWC14: George, you owe Rosalie an apology.$5
RosalieGeorgeWC15: I do not! #$b#She shouldn't be in a wheelchair! She's too young!
RosalieGeorgeWC16: You're right, she shouldn't be in a wheelchair.$5 #$b#But she is.$5
RosalieGeorgeWC17: Grandpa, weren't you in your fourties when you had your accident?$s
RosalieGeorgeWC18: That's different!#$b# She can walk! I can't!
RosalieGeorgeWCAnswer1: Harvey's right. It has nothing to do with age.
RosalieGeorgeWCResponse1: Of course it does!#$b#I'm sure she can snap back from whatever she has!
RosalieGeorgeWCResponse2: But she's *not* disabled. #$b# At least, not disabled enought to need a wheelchair!
RosalieGeorgeWCAnswer3: Rosalie shouldn't use a wheelchair if she doesn't need it.
RosalieGeorgeWC21: Gus, I heard your niece was an actress, #$b#But pretending to be disabled? #$b#You should be ashamed of her!
RosalieGeorgeWC22: She *is* disabled, George.$3 #$b#Have you ever heard of a 'dynamic disability'?$3
RosalieGeorgeWC24: A dynamic disability.$3#$b# The severity of the disability changes every day.$2#$b#One day, she's fine. The next, like today, she can't walk.
RosalieGeorgeWC26: She shouldn't have to tell you.$3
RosalieGeorgeWC27: Do you remember the vaccine? The one everyone had to get five years ago?$2
RosalieGeorgeWC28: Of course! I was one of the first to get it!$h
RosalieGeorgeWC29: Rosalie was too. She was on the front lines.$3 #$b# Now, she's in pain every day. For the rest of her life.$2
RosalieGeorgeWC32: The ramp is for all of us. At any time.$2
RosalieLewisRadio.0: Sorry it's not much. #$b#But I'm sure that with it, you'll be able to help out Gus with the rent or something.
RosalieLewisRadio.1: I would have taken a sea cucumber sandwich and a few crumpled ones!$1 #$b# This is perfect! Thank you, Mayor Lewis!
RosalieLewisRadio.2: Well, your voice was always something beautiful. #$b#So sharing it with the people in Stardew Valley, #$b#I told The Governor all about you being 'The Voice of The Valley'!$h #$b# So don't make me look bad!$a
RosalieLewisRadio.5: Well, it's still the old saloon dining room... turned into a bedroom...$3
RosalieLewisRadio.6: I know it doesn't seem like much,#$b# But really, you don't need all the fancy stuff to get started in recording for a radio station!$1
RosalieLewisRadio.7: Well, the saloon isn't busy during the day anyway, #$b#I'll be back here recording then and helping Uncle Gus at night!
RosalieLewisRadio.8: Rosie, don't you think that... You should slow down?$2 #$b#I know your flareups come at random, but sometimes, it's stress related,$2 #$b# or physical...$2
RosalieLewisRadio.9: Oh, I'm sure it's fine!$h #$b# You don't need much movement when you're working at a computer, right? #$b# Besides, the walking around the saloon at night should help with exersise to help with... other things.
RosalieLewisRadio.10: What is that supposed to mean?$3
RosalieLewisRadio.11: Mayor Lewis, you mentioned you had some paperwork for me to sign?$3 #$b#The pens are in the saloon, if you'd follow me?$1
RosalieLewisRadio.Q: I'm not sure what to do...
RosalieLewisRadio.A1: Why? This is a great opportunity!
RosalieLewisRadio.14: But I know Rosie, she's going to run herself to the ground.$2 #$b# She hyperfixates on things, and then runs in head first, and her body ends up paying the price for it later...$2
RosalieLewisRadio.15: I don't know... I run a saloon. I don't know about this kind of thing.$2
RosalieLewisRadio.16: Maybe you're right, @. #$b# Maybe she'll be alright.$h
RosaliesStory.0: Okay, beach... use your healing powers or whatever...
RosaliesStory.1: Oh, hey, @.#$b# Don't mind me, I'm just trying to get through some pain, same as always.$1
RosaliesStory.2: You know, this is the furthest I've gone out of the house other than the clinic.$7
RosaliesStory.3: It's funny, my mom was a nurse when I lived here, #$b# The building hasn't changed much either.
RosaliesStory.4: I mean, I didn't go to the clinic all the time!#$b# I used to visit a...normal amount...$1
RosaliesStory.5: You're probably wondering what happened to me...$2
RosaliesStory.Q: You want to know, what's wrong with me... right?
RosaliesStory.A1: Only if you're comfortable talking about it.
RosaliesStory.R1: Thanks, but I don't mind talking about it. #$b# We're friends, now! And I'm very impressed it took you this long to ask!$1
RosaliesStory.6: Five years ago, I was a different person. #$b# Strong. Strong willed.$9 #$b#I worked two jobs while going to theatre school full time, plus rehearsals, my hobbies, and... #$b#... cleaning the apartment...$2 #$b#Then I... We all...$2
RosaliesStory.7: You rememberwhat it was like...$2 #$b#People were up in arms about it.$2 #$b#None of the backlash was backed by actual science.$3 #$b#But, my mom and my sister are nurses. And we have to look out for each other on this spinning rock. #$b# I don't regret keeping people safe and healthy.#$b# Besdies, everyone was doing it, and I hadn't heard of anything bad happening. It was safe. #$b# And I had to do it in order to keep my job...$2 #$b# Sure, I wasn't saving anyone like my mom and sister were. I was just working a minimum wage job...$3 #$b#But I was still on the front lines... #$b#... The normal pains that everyone got... That were supposed to only last a day or two...$2 #$b# They never went away for me... and the pain just spread...$2#$b# I could barely move my arms or legs at the time without being in constant pain... even now, I'm still fighting it...$2 #$b# I couldn't keep my jobs.$3 #$b# But with all the extra time I had, I couldn't do the things I loved either.$2 #$b#I couldn't draw. Play piano or guitar or dance... all my joys were just... taken from me...$6 #$b# I still can't play or do things I used to do without paying the price.$6 #$b# All I had left was my voice, but even then, people didn't understand...$2#$b# Thinking I was just... fat and lazy... And who wants to see that singing and dancing on stage?$6 #$b# When I first got sick, Uncle Gus told me to come back to Pelican Town, me and my partner... #$b#But he... didn't want to.$2 #$b# He just...$2#$b# didn't want to...$3 #$b# Five years later, and here I am. #$b# Back in Stardew Valley...#$b# I hoped that if I ever came back, I'd be famous or something, you know?$1 #$b# Growing up, people kept saying my voice was beautiful and I'd go places... but I didn't...$6 #$b#I'm sick, in pain, and... alone...$6
RosaliesStory.8: $query PLAYER_HAS_SEEN_EVENT Current stardewaly.rosalie_RosaliesRibbonEventPost# I'm sorry, I didn't mean to make you sad$8 #$b# And I don't mean for you to feel sorry for me either. #$b#I honestly like my independence, even though it's harder some days than it ever was. #$b#And now I'm back here in Pelican Town...$1#$b#I met you, and Harvey, and Emily, and—-|I'm sorry, I didn't mean to make you sad$8 #$b# And I don't mean for you to feel sorry for me either. #$b#I honestly like my independence, even though it's harder some days than it ever was. #$b#And now I'm back here in Pelican Town...$1#$b#I met you, and Harvey, and Emily, and now, my childhood best friend lives here, too!$1
RosaliesStory.9: $query PLAYER_HAS_SEEN_EVENT Current stardewaly.rosalie_RosaliesRibbonEventPost#Well... It's nice to see some new and old faces... #$b# Even though I usually prefer to just stay in my room. #$b# It's nice to be somewhere that isn't connected with my... ex. And I'm really excited about being the Voice of the Valley...$1 #$b# Honest, I just have some growing pains to deal with. #$b# Mine just happen to be a little more literal.$1|It's nice to see some new and old faces... #$b# Even though I usually prefer to just stay in my room. #$b# It's nice to be somewhere that isn't connected with my... ex...$2 #$b# And I'm really excited about being the Voice of the Valley...$1 #$b# Honest, I just have some growing pains to deal with. #$b# Mine just happen to be a little more literal.$1
RosaliesStory.10: @, can you help me stand up?#$b# The water's been helping with the swelling but it's still painful to walk.$2
RosaliesStory.11: You help Rosalie stand and walk her back to the Saloon, and into her bed to recover from her flare up.
RosaliesFlareUp.0: Hi, @!$1 #$b# Sorry, Rosie is not feeling well today.$2.
RosaliesFlareUp.1: Hi, Dr Harvey! You're a little early for happy hour.
RosaliesFlareUp.2: Actually, I'm here to see Rosalie.#$b# She's been so diligent with her health and her appointments, #$b# But, she missed her appointment this morning and didn't call to let me know. I got worried.$2
RosaliesFlareUp.3: I'm sorry, Harvey. I didn't realize she had an appointment today.
RosaliesFlareUp.5: She... got some news about her husband...$2 #$b# I was prepparing us lunch so I didn't hear the call.$2#$b# She said she was fine, but she was shaken up and just went to bed...$2
RosaliesFlareUp.6: Do you think I could go check on her?
RosaliesFlareUp.7: Robin is with her right now, I'll take you to her room.
RosaliesFlareUp.A3: Since when has Rosalie been married? You think you know a person!
RosaliesFlareUp.R1: Technically, yes. But Rosie separated from her husband before she moved back here.$2
RosaliesFlareUp.R2: Technically, yes. Rosalie's married, but they separated before she moved back to Pelican Town.$2
RosaliesFlareUp.R3: I'm sorry, I know you two have gotten close. I'm sure she didn't mean to keep it from you.$2#$b# You know Rosie has a hard time opening up about things that make her vulnerable.$2 #$b# Even to those closest to her.$2
RosaliesFlareUp.8: Rosie was always a sweet girl. #$b# She's imaginative. Talented. Shy, but kind and bubbly when you got to know her. #$b# We all knew she was going to be something someday.$1 #$b# When her fella came into the picture, she was the same but... different.$2 #$b# I don't know much about the guy. They were high school sweethearts. I only met him at the wedding.$2#$b# Like her, he also has a great voice. Very talented.$1 #$b# He absolutely adored her. You could see it every time they looked at each other$1. #$b# She loved him too… #$b# More than she should have.$2 #$b# Before she got sick, she was always working. Multiple jobs, school, rehearsal.... #$b# Cleaning up after him... finding him jobs...$3 #$b# When she became disabled, he didn't leave her.$2 #$b# But he didn't step up either.$3 #$b# I told Rosie they could live here in Pelican Town. I offered him a job and everything. #$b# But he refused.$3 #$b# He said he wanted to save on their rent in the city or something.$3 #$b# That boy always had an excuse for everything. And Rosie went along with it because she loved him.$2
RosaliesFlareUp.9: I won't forgive him for that.$3 #$b# My niece was in pain and he cared more about his own comfort than what she needed.#$b# Anyway, Rosie came to her senses and called me when she was ready.$2 #$b# She says she's done with him... But if she wants to take him back, he's welcome.
RosaliesFlareUp.11: She's in a lot of pain, emotionally and physically.#$b# I think more than she's letting on.
RosaliesFlareUp.12: She keeps saying she's fine, she's cracking jokes,$1 #$b# But, I know that look since she was a kid.$2 #$b# The nerve of that guy.$3
RosaliesFlareUp.13: She doesn't want to burden anyone... It breaks my heart that she thinks she is.$2
RosaliesFlareUp.14: $d HasSeenEvent stardewaly.rosalie_RosaliesRibbonEventPost#I still can't get a hold of Shane. Marnie knows to call when she sees him.$2 #$b# But I let Rosalie know you're here, she's asking for you,@.|I let Rosalie know you're here, she's asking for you, @.
RosaliesFlareUp.Q2: Would you mind seeing her? I think she'd open up more if you're there, too.$3
RosaliesFlareUp.A4: Of course, I'll go with you.
RosaliesFlareUp.R5: Okay... #$b# I'll let her know you stopped by.
RosaliesFlareUp.16: Hi, @...$1 #$b# I'd give you a hug but... my arms are kind of... painful... $6
RosaliesFlareUp.18: Did you have a chance to look at the list of words to describe it?
RosaliesFlareUp.20: On a scale from 1-20, how would you rate your pain right now?
RosaliesFlareUp.22: Okay, so some improvement!#$b# That's good, the medication must be working!$1
RosaliesFlareUp.R6: Oh... He told you that...$3 #$b# Well, I guess he already told Robin everything, he may as well tell you too.$3
RosaliesFlareUp.A7: 1-20? Why not do 1-10 for a pain scale?
RosaliesFlareUp.R7: People with chronic pain have a different pain tollerance than people without. #$b# A 10 for someone who doens't experience pain regularly is the worst, but for someone like Rosalie, a 10 can be a normal day.
RosaliesFlareUp.R8: Yeah, of course!$1 #$b# I just... #$b# ...$2 #$b# No, of course I'm not okay...$6
RosaliesFlareUp.23: I just... I feel so weak... lazy... #$b# I want to do so much, I *need* to do so much and help... #$b# But my body won't let me... My brain won't let me...$2 #$b# I'm always too tired... in too much pain...$2#$b# and today, hearing his voice again...$2 #$b# Hearing him sob, and beg, then get angry...$3 #$b#Like I didn't love him enough to endure his problems for so long.$6 #$b#Like I didn't suffer because of his decisions and still stood by him...$11 #$b# Like I was less of a wife and partner because I couldn't do it anymore.$11
RosaliesFlareUp.24: Rosalie, I'm so sorry...$2#$b#Do you feel unsafe?$2
RosaliesFlareUp.25: No, I'm... safe. He won't do anything...$2#$b#But aside from that, I hate this. I know I'm not supposed to complain, but it seriously just sucks that I'm like this!$11 #$b# What's the point of getting out of bed? Leaving my room?$11 #$b# What's the point of anything if I'm just going to continue feeling this way for the rest of my sad, pathetic life?$11
RosaliesFlareUp.26: $query !PLAYER_HAS_SEEN_EVENT Current stardewaly.rosalie_ShaneRosalieSneezeEvent#I know it's difficult. I can't begin to know what challenges you face every day.$2 #$b# I know it's hard being strong all the time. We see it every day.$2 #$b# You're allowed to fall apart. It's okay. You have full permission to be as exhausted and sad as you need to.$2#$b# But Rose, you're also the Voice of The Valley.#$b# And I mean that figuratively, and literally.$1#$b# You matter more than you think to so many people. And, when you're falling apart, you're not alone.$7#$b#I know it feels better to isolate yourself. And I know you've been through a lot. But, now, you're here. #$b# You're home now. You have Gus, and @, Emily, and Robin. #$b# The whole town is behind you.$1 #$b# I like to think we've gotten closer since we met. #$b# In fact, I consider you one of my closest friends.$1|I know it's difficult. I can't begin to know what challenges you face every day.$2 #$b# I know it's hard being strong all the time. We see it every day.$2 #$b# You're allowed to fall apart. It's okay. You have full permission to be as exhausted and sad as you need to.$2#$b# But Rose, you're also the Voice of The Valley.#$b# And I mean that figuratively, and literally.$1#$b# You matter more than you think to so many people. And, when you're falling apart, you're not alone.$7#$b#I know it feels better to isolate yourself. And I know you've been through a lot. But, now, you're here. #$b# You're home now. You have Gus, and @, Emily, Robin, and Jas and Marnie and Shane...$1 #$b# The whole town is behind you.$1 #$b# I like to think we've gotten closer since we met. #$b# In fact, I consider you a friend.$1
RosaliesFlareUp.Shane: Shane and I haven't been friends in 20 years.$3 #$b# He has his own demons to deal with, he doesn't need me to add to them.$2 #$b# Besides, I'm sure he just zones out when I blabber about who knows what. Everyone does.$3
RosaliesFlareUp.27: Until I flake... or talk about something too much that you don't care about.$3
RosaliesFlareUp.28: Rose, I don't mind.$1 #$b# We talked for nearly an hour about the Prismatic Girls last week, didn't we?$1
RosaliesFlareUp.30: $query !PLAYER_HAS_SEEN_EVENT Current stardewaly.rosalie_ShaneRosalieSneezeEvent#You're a passionate person, Rosalie... #$b# It's endearing... I like that about you.$4 #$b# You don't need to hold back from being yourself around me.$4 #$b# I want to hear all about the things you're passionate about. Even if I don't understand, I want to try!$4|You're a passionate person, Rosalie... #$b# I like that about you.$1 #$b# I like that you're unapologtically yourself. I admire that about you.$1
RosaliesFlareUp.Q4: I think I speak for both of us, right?
RosaliesFlareUp.A9: You should see Harvey's fancy old radio in his apartment!
RosaliesFlareUp.R9.1: You have a radio, Dr H?!$8
RosaliesFlareUp.R9.2: $d HasSeenEvent 571102#I um...$8 #$b# ...$2 #$b# Yeah, I like to listen for planes when it's raining...$1|I um...$8 #$b# ...$2 #$b# Yeah, I do.$1
RosaliesFlareUp.R9.3: Why didn't you tell me?$1 #$b# You know I love old timey stuff like tha-- #$b# Oh, I'm sorry. You two probably have things to do.$1
RosaliesFlareUp.32: Uncle Gus Gus, really?$1 #$b# 'Good Time Rosie'?$9 #$b# My dad's having you call me that too?$1
RosaliesFlareUp.33: Are you hungry? I can bring your food inside so you can watch your cartoons.$1 #$b# Harvey, @, I think I owe you both a drink for making Rosie smile again.
RosaliesFlareUp.34: Thanks for stopping by you two. It means a lot to me.
RosaliesFlareUp.35: Actually, I don't have plans for dinner.#$b# I wouldn't want you to eat alone while Gus is running the saloon...$1
RosaliesFlareUp.36: Sure thing, Harvey. I'll bring out another plate. #$b# @, you wouldn't happen to be able to help me out in the kitchen, would you$1
RosaliesFlareUp.37: After dinner, do you want me to stay with you? Talk some more? #$b# If you need rest, we could talk over my lunch break tomorrow when you're feeling better?$4
RosaliesFlareUp.Shane2: Are you okay? I'm sorry I didn't get here sooner.$2#$b# I came as soon as I heard!$2
RosaliesFlareUp.Shane3: I'm not dying, Farm Boy.$1 #$b# Just... in a lot of pain, as always.$2
RosaliesFlareUp.Shane4: Anything I can do to help?#$b# I mean...$3#$b# I'll probably mess it up anyway...$2
RosaliesFlareUp.Shane5: Just... stay with me for a bit?$2 #$b# We can catch up... watch Junimo Tales like old times?$9
RosaliesFlareUp.Shane6: I don't know, it the reboot or the original?$6
RosaliesFlareUp.Shane7: The original, duh! The writing is better and it's more violent!$1 #$b# Besides, the reboot cut your first crush.$9
RosaliesFlareUp.Shane8: Not Miss Junimo Mulleb?!$10 #$b# I mean... who?$3 #$b# Buh, I can't believe you remember that. You're lucky you're sick, Rosa.$11
RosaliesFlareUp.Shane9: Hey, hey! Don't sass your elders!$1
RosaliesFlareUp.Shane10: Oh, you're still gonna play the 'older than you' card?$1#$b#I thought you would have matured in the last 20 years!$1
RosaliesFlareUp.MessageHarvey: Harvey tenderly takes Rosalie's hand. She looks at their joined hands in surprise.
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.0: Uncle Gus, why don't you let me and Emily close for the night. #$b# You head to bed.
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.1: Are you sure? You've been on your feet all day, I know that--$s
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.2: Uncle Gus Gus, I took my meds, I'm fine. #$b# Besides, I worked at that chocolate shop long enough to know how to close!$1
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.3: Well, alright...$h #$b# Thanks, Rosie... #$b# Just don't push yourself.$s #$b# Ask Emily if you need help.
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.4: Oh! @!$8 #$b# I'm sorry, we closed at midnight!
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.5: Thanks, I'm glad you thinks so.$1
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.6: Thank goodness, the door was unlocked. #$b# Gus, you didn't happen to come across--$h
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.7: Dr Harvey! Did you forget something?$1
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.8: Rosalie! Uh... What are you doing here?$8
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.10: No, that's not what I mean! I just meant--
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.11: Hi, Harvey!$h #$b# I noticed you left your scarf behind, I'll go grab it from the back.
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.12: I sent Gus to bed early.#$b# I just thought I'd close up for the night as a thank you to him.
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.13: That's very kind of you! #$b# But... Shouldn't you be resting? Our last appointment you said-$2
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.14: I know, and as I said, I'm fine.$3
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.15: Alright, you know your body best.$2 #$b# But if anything changes, let me know at our next appointment. #$b# I'll see you then.$h
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.18: I thought you'd understand that reference!$1 #$b# Anyway... I've been... meaning to ask you... since you arrived to town...
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.20: Not to my knowledge...$2 #$b# I think I'd remember that.$9
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.21: Here's your scarf! You have a good night, Harvey!
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.25: I'm sorry, I've taken enough of your time.$1. #$b# Emily, Rosalie, @, have a good night...
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.27: Nothing, we were just talking.$1 #$b# Anyway, I'll be back.#$b# @, you should also be heading home. Have a good night!$1
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.28: @...$3 #$b# I need you to tell me what Harvey and Rosalie talked about.$3
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.29: Oh my Yoba! I knew it!$6
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.30: I had a feeling when Rosalie came to town!$1 #$b# There's something... strange about her...$3 #$b# Everyone in town has been acting different since she arrived.$3 #$b# I need to talk to Sandy about this!$1
RosalieHarveyFamiliar.31: @...This is our secret.$3 #$b# Please, don't tell anyone.$3
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.0: Hey! @! I'm so happy you made it!$1 #$b# I'm really nervous, a lot can happen when recording life. And everyone's... watching...$2
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.A1: Aren't you an actor? You can't get stage fright!
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.A2: Don't worry, I'm sure you're gonna be great!
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.R1: I typically don't.$1 #$b# But I find it easier for strangers than in front of people I know.$2
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.R2: Thanks, @. I'm glad someone believes in me.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.R3: Thanks but I'd rather not imagine Mayor Lewis in his underwear!$1 #$b# But... I haven't been this nervous since I was a kid...$2
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.1: Last time I hosted something live, it was a disaster...$2 #$b# Oh, Yoba! Why did I agree to do this?!$8
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.3: Of course, I'm fine! I got this in the bag!$1 #$b# Why?$2
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.4: You furrow your brows and bite your lip when you're nervous.$6
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.5: Seriously? I'm that obvious?!$8#$b# Urg...and here I was thinking I was thinking I'm a good actor.$3
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.7: @! Would you mind sitting with me while I'm on the air?$2#$b# I'll feel a bit better knowing you're there with me.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.8: Just put on these headphones and you'll be able to hear what I do.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.9: Okay everyone, quiet down! #$b# We're on air in 3... #$b# 2...
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.10: Hello Stardew Valley! This is *The Voice of the Valley*
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.Q2: You notice that Rosalie is shaking a bit after seeing everyone's reaction.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.A4: Hold her hand and squeeze it.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.R4: Rosalie looks at you in surprise and squeezes your hand back.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.R5: Rosalie smiles a little and turns back to the mic, a little more confident.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.R6: I'm here, live at the amazing Stardrop Saloon in Pelican Town, #$b# Can we have everyone give a grand hello to those tuning in?$1
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.11: Now, I'd like to start our program by talking to one of our newest and most popular residents, #$b# and one of my best and dearest friends: @!$1
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.12: So, @, I heard your Grandfather gave you his farm when he passed. #$b# I don't think I ever met him, but I'm very sorry for your loss.$2
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.InterviewQ1: So, now that you've taken over his farm, what exactly do you do as a farmer?
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.InterviewA1: I slay monsters in the mines.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.InterviewA2: I feed the community to try and beat out big corporations like Joja.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.InterviewA3: I make and sell stuff for money.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.InterviewR1: Wow, that's incredible! I could never do something like that! #$b# I guess that's why I'm on the radio, huh?$1 #$b# Now, next question...$1
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.InterviewQ2: What would you say is your favourite thing about living in the valley since moving here?
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.InterviewA5: Mayor Lewis and his lack of accessibility laws.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.InterviewR4: You know, I have to agree.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.InterviewR5.1: Mayor Lewis, do you have anything to say?$9
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.InterviewR5.3: We need people like @ to speak their mind about people like me.#$b#I am so lucky to be surrounded by friends and family here in Pelican Town who care enough about me to make sure I'm accommodated. #$b# And believe me...$2
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley.InterviewR6: $d PLAYER_NPC_RELATIONSHIP Current Haley Married#So, *that's* the secret to making a marriage work?$8 #$b#No wonder I'm getting divorced!$1|Oh... Um...$8 #$b# Haley, um haha... I...think you need to invest in a lock for your bedroom!$1
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley13: Now, folks, I'm gonna get real for a second... #$b#I used to live here in Stardew Valley as a kid. Right here in Pelican Town. #$b#I moved at 12 years old and left everyone and everything I knew behind... #$b#I was really sad to go... but my parents said I'd meet new people. Make new friends...$2 #$b#And they were right, but nothing ever felt quite like home until I moved back to this small provincial town.#$b# I was afraid that moving back would make me feel like I failed at everything I set out to do.$2 #$b# But it's thanks to people like @ that I don't feel like a stranger anymore.#$b# I feel like I'm finally... home. Where I belong. And I plan to stay as long as I can.
RosaliesVoiceOfTheValley14: Thanks to you, Rosalie finally feels at home. Her boxes are now finally unpacked.
